commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 44%, while the sportsbook consensus favors a draw at 42%. On the Paraguay win, the gap widens further: books price it at 34% versus the model's 26%, an 8-percentage-point differential. This inversion across outcomes may reflect recent form, lineup changes, or injury news unavailable to the model at its last update. Polymarket prices align closely with the sportsbooks, reinforcing their skepticism toward the model's Australia lean. The dashboard surfaces this divergence as a signal worth monitoring, without adjudicating which source has captured intervening information more accurately.
